{{CargoClone
|name=Widow in White
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=124
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Water DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Water DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Demon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Water DMG +1.5%
|}}
